articles.description: Only three games in, Tottenham's head coach is facing crisis. Igor Tudor refused to comment on whether he is about to be sacked - but said some players will need "to leave the boat".
articles.title: Tottenham 1-3 Crystal Palace: 'Disbelief' - thousands leave early as Spurs in freefall

articles.description: McLaren's Oscar Piastri sets the fastest time in Friday practice at the season-opening Australian Grand Prix.
articles.title: Australian Grand Prix: Oscar Piastri fastest from Kimi Antonelli and George Russell in Melbourne

articles.description: All the reaction as Tottenham Hotspur lose to Crystal Palace, leaving them just a point above the drop zone and relegation fears deepening.
articles.title: Tottenham relegation fears: Spurs lose to Palace to prolong winless run
No laughing matter for Wales in Dublin after Irish jibes

articles.description: LeBron James surpasses Kareem Abdul-Jabbar for the most field goals in NBA history as the Los Angeles Lakers lose at the Denver Nuggets.
articles.title: NBA: LeBron James surpasses Kareem Abdul-Jabbar to claim field-goal record

articles.description: Players have criticised the decision for a tennis tournament to be held in the UAE in the midst of Iranian attacks - including one still stranded there.
articles.title: Middle East conflict: Tennis players criticise ATP decision to start tournament in United Arab Emirates

articles.description: BBC Sport football expert Chris Sutton takes on Peaky Blinders creator Steven Knight plus the BBC readers and AI with his predictions for this weekend's FA Cup fifth-round ties.
articles.title: Premier League predictions: Chris Sutton v Peaky Blinders creator Steven Knight - and AI

articles.description: Aston Martin's dire start to the season has left Fernando Alonso in a "hard mental place", says team principal Adrian Newey.
articles.title: Fernando Alonso in 'hard mental place' because of Aston Martin's problems, says Adrian Newey

articles.description: Dana White says he has "no issues" with Eddie Hearn after UFC heavyweight champion Tom Aspinall signed for the boxing promotor's new talent agency.
articles.title: Tom Aspinall: Dana White has 'no issues' with Eddie Hearn after Tom Aspinall deal

articles.description: Brendon McCullum wants to stay as England coach but it is still up for debate whether he will get that chance, writes Matthew Henry.
articles.title: T20 World Cup: Brendon McCullum wants to stay as England coach - but will that be enough?
